result.summary: Google Authorized Buyers exposes one documented REST API surface for marketplace operations at `authorizedbuyersmarketplace.googleapis.com`, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens obtained via a Google Cloud service account.
result.description: Authorized Buyers is Google's programmatic advertising marketplace for buyers, bidders, and related ad-tech integrations. The Marketplace API lets authorized buyers manage auction packages, clients, proposals, and deals programmatically.

google_service_account.label: Google Cloud service account for Authorized Buyers Marketplace API
google_service_account.setup: Create a Google Cloud project and enable the Authorized Buyers Marketplace API. In [Google Cloud Console service accounts](https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/serviceaccounts), create a service account, then create and download a JSON key. Use the Google OAuth 2.0 service-account flow to mint an access token, and make sure the service account has access to your Authorized Buyers account as described in the [Authorized Buyers Marketplace authentication guide](https://developers.google.com/authorized-buyers/curation/apis/marketplace/overview) and [Google service account docs](https://developers.google.com/identity/protocols/oauth2/service-account).
